CLI Commands

Command Tree

Caution

Trading commands default to --signature-type deposit. Deposit wallet (type 3 / POLY_1271) is the supported live trading mode.

Discovery

Discovery commands are read-only and require no credentials.

CLOB

Authenticated CLOB account commands require POLYMARKET_PRIVATE_KEY so polygolem can derive L2 credentials. Cancel commands mutate upstream order state but reduce existing exposure; order placement still requires deposit wallet signing.

Data API

Streams

The CLI exposes the public market WebSocket stream. The authenticated user stream remains SDK-planned until L2 WebSocket auth has local tests.

More

The canonical CLI reference is docs/COMMANDS.md. Every command accepts --json and --help.
